get.description: Get the basic health state of the system.

Public, unauthenticated feature flags the web client gates its sharing UI on.

schema.title: Response List Available Login Schemes Api Auth List Get

307.description: Set session cookie and redirect to `target_path` page or start page.
Redirect to external OpenIDConnect provider authentikation endpoint. . After coming back the callback endpoint will set a session cookie and redirect to the webapp.
Redirect to external OpenIDConnect provider authentikation endpoint. After coming back the callback endpoint will return an API access token.

get.description:
Callback endpoint triggered after redirection from the OpenID Connect (OIDC) provider.

Depending on the login method used:
- **Session login** (`/auth/oidc/login/{provider_slug}/session`) returns a **307 Redirect** to the `target_path`.
- **Token login** (`/auth/oidc/login/{provider_slug}/token`) returns a **200 OK** with a JSON access token.

Supports both browser-based and API-based flows.

307.description: Set a session cookie and redirect to the `target_path` given to the login endpoint.

get.description: Get account data from the current user

Search for other users by name to share a card with them. Returns only id / user_name / display_name (never email). Available to any authenticated user when SHARING_USER_SEARCH_ENABLED is on. If the caller logged in via an OIDC provider configured with RESTRICT_USER_SEARCH_TO_OWN_GROUPS, results are limited to users that share at least one OIDC group with the caller.

sharing_enabled.title: Sharing Enabled
sharing_enabled.description: Master switch for card sharing (collaborators + public links). When false, the whole share UI is hidden.

sharing_public_links_enabled.title: Sharing Public Links Enabled
sharing_public_links_enabled.description: Whether owners may create anonymous public share links. When false, hide the public-links section.

sharing_user_search_enabled.title: Sharing User Search Enabled
sharing_user_search_enabled.description: Whether users may search for other users when picking a share target. When false, hide the user-search field.

sharing_require_invite_accept.title: Sharing Require Invite Accept
sharing_require_invite_accept.description: Whether a share creates a pending invite the target must accept before gaining access (invite mode).

PublicConfig.title: PublicConfig
PublicConfig.description:
The subset of server feature flags the web client needs to decide which
sharing UI to render. Mirrors the like-named ``Config`` switches.

permission.description: What an anonymous visitor holding this link may do.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: Optional naive-UTC expiry. Null = never expires.

password.title: Password
password.description: Optional passphrase guarding this link. When set, a visitor must unlock it before the link resolves. Null = no passphrase. Never echoed back — only 'password_protected' is exposed.

password_protected.title: Password Protected
password_protected.description: Whether a passphrase must be supplied before this link resolves.

token.title: Token
token.description: The secret capability. Shown once; store it now — it is never returned again.

PublicLinkCreateResult.title: PublicLinkCreateResult
PublicLinkCreateResult.description: Returned only by create — the one and only time the token is exposed.

password_protected.title: Password Protected
password_protected.description: Whether a passphrase must be supplied before this link resolves.

PublicLinkRead.title: PublicLinkRead
PublicLinkRead.description: A public link *without* its token or passphrase (safe to list).

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: Set to null explicitly to clear the expiry.

password.title: Password
password.description: Set a string to (re)protect the link with a passphrase; send an explicit null to clear protection. Omit to leave it unchanged.

SharePermission.title: SharePermission
SharePermission.description:
A permission level that can be *granted* to a share target (collaborator or
public link). Ownership is not grantable via a share — it is transferred via
the dedicated transfer-ownership action — so it is intentionally absent here.
See ``checkcheckserver.api.access.ChecklistAccessLevel`` for the full ladder
(which adds ``owner``) used for authorization checks.

status.description: Whether the share is live ('accepted'), an unaccepted invite ('pending'), or declined.

ShareRead.title: ShareRead
ShareRead.description: A single collaborator entry with enough user info to render a share list.

ShareStatus.title: ShareStatus
ShareStatus.description:
Lifecycle of a share grant. With ``SHARING_REQUIRE_INVITE_ACCEPT`` off
(default) every share is created ``accepted`` and behaves as it always has.
With the flag on, a fresh share starts ``pending`` and grants **no** access
until the target accepts; declining keeps a ``declined`` row (so the owner can
re-invite and the UI can show "you previously declined").

permission.description: Permission level to grant the target user.

id.title: Id
id.description: Monotonic insertion order; used by the SQLite drain loop

cl_id.title: Cl Id
cl_id.description: Checklist that has to be updated by the client

cli_id.title: Cli Id
cli_id.description: ID of Checklist item that has to be updated by the client

target_user_ids.title: Target User Ids
target_user_ids.description: Explicit delivery targets (user ids as strings), captured at emit time. Used for events that destroy the rows target resolution relies on — deleting a checklist or revoking a collaborator — where resolving from live DB state would yield the wrong set (or nobody). When None, targets are resolved dynamically from owner + current collaborators.

target_tokens.title: Target Tokens
target_tokens.description: Public-share tokens of connected anonymous SSE clients to deliver this notification to (in addition to target_user_ids). Lets live updates reach logged-out viewers. When None, resolved dynamically from the checklist's currently-active public links.

new_owner_id.title: New Owner Id
new_owner_id.description: The user that should become the new owner. The previous owner is demoted to an 'edit' collaborator.

previous_owner_id.title: Previous Owner Id
previous_owner_id.description: The previous owner, now demoted to an 'edit' collaborator.

grant.title: Grant
grant.description: Short-lived signed grant. Replay it on subsequent calls via the 'X-Share-Grant' header or '?share_grant=' query so you don't resend the passphrase.

oidc_groups.title: Oidc Groups
oidc_groups.description: The OIDC groups the user belonged to on their last OIDC login. Empty for local users. Used to optionally restrict user search to shared groups.

UserAuthPublic.title: UserAuthPublic
UserAuthPublic.description: Safe-to-expose read model for API key / credential listings. Contains no secrets.

oidc_groups.title: Oidc Groups
oidc_groups.description: The OIDC groups the user belonged to on their last OIDC login. Empty for local users. Used to optionally restrict user search to shared groups.

UserSearchResult.title: UserSearchResult
UserSearchResult.description:
Minimal, safe-to-expose user info for picking a share target.
Deliberately excludes email and any auth details.

expires_at_epoch_time.title: Expires At Epoch Time
expires_at_epoch_time.description: The set time when the session expires or the OIDC token needs a refresh.

oidc_groups.title: Oidc Groups
oidc_groups.description: The OIDC groups the user belonged to on their last OIDC login. Empty for local users. Used to optionally restrict user search to shared groups.
